docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-12-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ALICE EUCBANK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAMUEL WONG IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2019 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $63.49 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO PLAINTIFF EUBANK, ALICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED APR-27-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, SAMUEL

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EUBANK, ALICE AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, SAMUEL
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, SAMUEL
